nodes.text:
# Container — Internet Banking System

*C4 Level 2 · the containers (apps & datastores) inside one system*

## Legend

- **Container** (in focus) — React/RN/Spring app
- **Datastore** — `[DB]` PostgreSQL
- **Person** — human actor
- **External** — `[External]` outside the system
- **Boundary** = `group: Internet Banking System`

Every container states its **tech**; every edge states its **protocol**.

[Person] Customer

A personal banking customer of the bank.

Single-Page App
[Container: React]
Provides banking features via the browser.

Mobile App
[Container: React Native]
Provides a subset of banking features.

API Application
[Container: Java/Spring MVC]
Provides banking via JSON/HTTPS.

[DB] Database
[Container: PostgreSQL]
Stores accounts, transactions, audit.

[External] E-mail System
The internal Microsoft Exchange system.

[External] Mainframe Banking System
Stores core banking information.
